news.headline: ERES files notice for special meeting, urges Unitholders to view materials online. Vote on trust unit amendments. TSX: ERE.UN.
news.summary: European Residential Real Estate Investment Trust, also known as ERES, disclosed today that it has submitted its notice-and-access notification, management information circular, proxy form, and voting instruction form for the special meeting of its Unitholders. The Meeting is set to be held to obtain approval for amendments to its declaration of trust. The REIT's ticker symbol is ERE.UN and the announcement was made on December 6th, 2024 in Toronto.

news.headline: Market near highs, Bitcoin below $100K; jobs report pending. Key question: when to sell "heat" stocks?
news.summary: As the market nears record highs and awaits the release of the jobs report, Bitcoin struggled to maintain the $100,000 mark. Investors are contemplating the right time to offload "heat" stocks amid this uncertainty.

news.headline: Sky's handling of $756M in USDC reserves through externally owned accounts sparks security concerns and scrutiny.
news.summary: Sky, previously known as MakerDAO, has come under scrutiny for utilizing externally owned accounts (EOAs) to oversee a significant $756 million in USDC reserves. This has sparked concerns about the security and transparency of the management of these funds.

news.headline: Security costs for CEOs on the rise after UnitedHealthCare's Brian Thompson's tragic death, leading to heightened protection measures.
news.summary: The recent murder of Brian Thompson from UnitedHealthCare has compelled companies to enhance security measures for their top executives.

news.headline: Trump appoints David Sacks, associated with Elon Musk, as AI czar and crypto leader in Silicon Valley.
news.summary: The President-elect, Donald Trump, has appointed David Sacks, a venture capitalist from Silicon Valley and a close associate of Elon Musk, as his Artificial Intelligence (AI) czar. Sacks will also oversee matters related to cryptocurrency. This move signifies Trump's interest in bolstering the technology sector. The news was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Asana's stock jumps after beating Q3 earnings expectations with revenue topping views, meeting guidance.
news.summary: Following the release of its third quarter earnings report, the software maker experienced a significant increase in stock value. Earnings and revenue surpassed expectations, leading to a notable jump in stock price. Guidance for future performance met market expectations. This positive news surrounding the software maker led to a surge in investor interest, propelling the company's stock forward.

news.headline: HPE's AI server growth slows in Q4, but Wall Street remains optimistic for HPE stock due to Nvidia's 'Blackwell' ramp.
news.summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise saw a slowdown in AI server growth in the fourth quarter of its fiscal year. However, analysts on Wall Street anticipate positive movement for HPE stock as Nvidia introduces the 'Blackwell' project. Despite the slowdown, the market remains optimistic about the future prospects of HPE's AI server business, reflecting in the positive attitude towards the company's stock. This development was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Fountain Asset Corp. grants 1,950,000 stock options at $0.05/share to directors/officers, expiring Dec 05, 2029.
news.summary: In Toronto on December 06, 2024, Fountain Asset Corp. (TSXV:FA) disclosed that their board of directors has authorized the provision of 1,950,000 incentive stock options (the “Options”) under the Company’s stock option plan to specific directors and officers of the firm, pending TSXV clearance. These Options can be exercised at a rate of $0.05 per share and will be valid until December 05, 2029.

news.headline: $SHIB gains momentum with raised burn rate, 53 million coins burnt in a day. Price $0.00003011, Market Cap $17.7B. Traders optimistic for significant price spike.
news.summary: Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) has been on the rise recently due to a notable increase in its burn rate and a consistent uptick in whale transactions. As of now, SHIB is priced at $0.00003011 with a market capitalization of $17.7 billion. Over the past 24 hours, it has seen a 5.5% decrease, but over the last week, it has surged by 16.5%.Comparatively, Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) is currently at $0.4277 with a market cap of $63.2 billion, showing a 3.6% decline in the last day and a 3.8% increase in the past week. Pepe (CRYPTO: PEPE) stands at $0.00002115 with a market cap of $8.9 billion. It has experienced a 4.3% drop in the last 24 hours and a 4.8% rise over the week.Market analysts are expressing optimism about SHIB's future trajectory, with Bluntz Capital indicating a potential significant price surge by tweeting that a "God candle is loading" for Shiba Inu. This positive sentiment has been reflected in the trading community, sparking interest in SHIB's movement.

news.headline: "ESG boosted by investor assemblies. Stay informed on sustainable practices."
ViewTrade partners with Moment to expand fixed income market access for investors - enhancing services for investment advisors.
news.summary: In Jersey City, New Jersey on December 6, 2024, ViewTrade, a worldwide provider of financial services technology solutions, has unveiled a new strategic alliance with Moment, a prominent fixed income execution platform. This collaboration will empower investment advisors to provide fractional investment options to clients, enhancing accessibility to diverse portfolios.

news.headline: Realbotix Corp's crypto holdings surged by 52% since Nov 1st, 2024, with a total value of $15.3M as of Dec. 1st.
news.summary: In Las Vegas, Realbotix Corp. (XBOT on TSX-V, 76M0.F on Frankfurt Stock Exchange, XBOTF on OTC) provided an update on its cryptocurrency treasury. The company, known for humanoid robots and AI companions, disclosed holdings valued at around $15.3 million USD or CAD$21.5 million as of December.

news.headline: Honeywell's lowered guidance is seen as positive by investors.(Characters: 60)
Fiserv's report on 2024 Thanksgiving spending trends shows consumer growth from 800M transactions across the US.
news.summary: Fiserv, Inc., a prominent global provider of payments and financial services technology listed on the NYSE under the ticker FI, recently released a report focusing on consumer spending trends during the 2024 holiday shopping season. Drawing insights from close to 800 million transactions across numerous U.S. business sites, the analysis delves into consumer expenditure patterns from November 27 to December 2. The detailed report offers valuable data on the spending habits during the Thanksgiving holiday period in 2024.

news.headline: Dave Portnoy sold his $2 million worth of Bitcoin at $11,000 per coin after talking to Winklevoss twins. Bitcoin now at $98,000.
news.summary: Barstool Sports founder Dave Portnoy humorously admitted to a regretful decision involving Bitcoin, where he initially purchased $2 million worth of Bitcoin in 2020 at $11,000 per coin, only to sell it shortly after a conversation with the Winklevoss twins. Bitcoin's current trading price is $98,000, hitting an all-time high of $103,679 on December 12. This decision led to a significant missed opportunity for Portnoy as the value of Bitcoin surged, highlighting the unpredictable nature of cryptocurrency investments.

news.headline: Pierre Fitzgibbon joins Concordia’s Volt-Age advisory, bringing expertise from energy and economy sectors, guiding innovation.
news.summary: Concordia University in Montreal has announced that Pierre Fitzgibbon, the former Minister for Economy, Innovation, and Energy for Quebec, has joined the advisory board of its Volt-Age program. With a wealth of experience from both public and private sectors, Fitzgibbon is expected to provide valuable insights to guide the program's strategic initiatives. The Volt-Age program aims to drive innovation and facilitate the shift towards a sustainable energy landscape. Fitzgibbon's appointment is seen as a significant move to enhance the program's efforts towards electrification.

news.headline: Mattr Corp. priced 125,000 debt subscription receipts at $1,018.75 each for $129.3 million in gross proceeds.
news.summary: Mattr Corp. (TSX: MATR) has finalized an underwriting agreement for a private placement offering, selling 125,000 debt subscription receipts at $1,018.75 each (6.375% yield to maturity). This sale, along with accrued interest, amounts to an aggregate issue price of $1,034 and gross proceeds of about $129.3 million. Each Subscription Receipt will grant the holder a 7.25% senior unsecured note due April 2, 2031, at $1,000 principal. The issuance adds an additional $300 million in 7.25% senior unsecured notes due 2031 under current trust agreements.

news.headline: Yvonne van der Laan awarded 2024 Winthrop-Sears medal for exceptional contributions to chemistry innovation and entrepreneurship.
news.summary: Recognition has been given to outstanding innovators and entrepreneurs in the field of chemistry. This acknowledgment highlights individuals who have made significant contributions and advancements in the industry. This prestigious honor celebrates the top performers in the world of chemistry, showcasing their dedication and impact on the field.

news.headline: SL Green Realty Corp. raises annual ordinary dividend to $3.09 per share.
HydroGraph increases private placement to $3.5M, not for U.S. distribution. Amounts in Canadian dollars.
news.summary: The information shared is not intended for release to U.S. newswire services or distribution within the United States. Any monetary figures provided are in Canadian dollars unless specified otherwise.

news.headline: Gaxos Labs introduces visual editor for Godot Engine, simplifying AI integration for game developers/publishers.
news.summary: In Roseland, New Jersey on December 6, 2024, Gaxos.ai Inc. revealed the launch of a visual editor for Godot Engine as part of their artificial intelligence solution, Gaxos Labs. This company specializes in AI applications and aims to assist game developers and publishers. The newly introduced Godot visual editor provides a simplified interface for integrating AI-driven elements into game projects. This move is set to enhance efficiency and accessibility for developers seeking to incorporate advanced features.

news.headline: Biohaven presents updated data for BHV-7000 at AES 2024, showing safety in Phase 1 studies with excellent tolerability.
news.summary: New safety results from the BHV-7000 Phase 1 multiple ascending dose studies have been released. These results include findings on the once-daily extended-release formulation currently being tested in Phase 2 and 3 clinical trials. The studies showed that the medication was well-tolerated at all doses assessed, with no significant central nervous system side effects observed. This indicates positive safety profile for BHV-7000, supporting its continued evaluation in ongoing trials.

news.headline: Hesai Technology secures exclusive lidar deal with Great Wall Motor for multiple models, featuring ATX.
news.summary: Today in Shanghai, Hesai Technology, a top provider of lidar solutions, revealed a major milestone by securing an exclusive series production design contract with Great Wall Motor. The agreement, covering multiple models under both of Great Wall Motor's brands, will incorporate Hesai's ATX technology. This significant deal marks a pivotal moment for Hesai and Great Wall Motor, as they forge ahead in the automotive industry. The announcement comes as Hesai's stock, listed on NASDAQ under the symbol HSAI, continues to perform strongly.

news.headline: ADC Therapeutics will share LOTIS-7 trial results on Dec 11, 2024, in a webcast at 8:30 a.m. EST.
news.summary: A conference call and live webcast will be held by ADC Therapeutics SA (NYSE: ADCT) on December 11, 2024, in LAUSANNE, Switzerland. The event, scheduled at 8:30 a.m. EST, will provide a corporate update including key results.

news.headline: AGCO to hold analyst meeting in NYC on Dec 19, 2024. Leader in agricultural machinery and tech. NYSE: AGCO.
news.summary: On December 6, 2024, in Duluth, Georgia, AGCO, a prominent company in agricultural machinery and precision ag technology, revealed plans to hold an analyst meeting in New York City on December 19, 2024. AGCO, recognized on the NYSE as AGCO, is known for its worldwide presence in designing, manufacturing, and distributing agricultural equipment. This forthcoming meeting is set to provide insights and updates for investors and analysts.

news.headline: Electronic Waste Recycling Market to reach $66.33 billion by 2029, growing at 6.5% CAGR, per MarketsandMarkets™ study. Recycling plays vital role in environmental protection and resource recovery. Key players include Dell, Umicore, Quantum Lifecycle Partners, and more. Market driven by increasing production of consumer electronics. Drivers: circular economy initiatives, Challenges: handling capacity and high establishment cost.
news.summary: The Electronic Waste Recycling Market is projected to grow from USD 48.41 billion in 2024 to USD 66.33 billion by 2029, with a 6.5% CAGR. E-waste recycling involves collecting, disassembling, and processing discarded electronic devices to recover valuable materials while minimizing the environmental impact. Key players in the market include Dell Inc., Umicore SA, Quantum Lifecycle Partners, among others. The market has 201 market data tables, 52 figures, and 260 pages. Key drivers include the growing production of consumer electronics, while challenges include economic viability and high establishment costs. The metals segment is expected to grow with the highest CAGR, and IT & Telecommunication is expected to play a significant role. E-waste recycling is crucial in preventing hazardous substances from contaminating the environment and promotes responsible disposal practices and resource recovery.

news.headline: David Rosenberg, with years of Wall Street experience, apologizes for his pessimistic outlook on the stock market.
French Socialist Leader Olivier Faure: We told Macron we won't accept a right-wing PM 'under any circumstance.'
BTC Digital Ltd. prices $20 million public offering, gross proceeds of $20.0 million expected.
news.summary: In Singapore on December 6, 2024, BTC Digital Ltd. (NASDAQ: BTCT), a blockchain technology company, disclosed the details of a firm commitment underwritten public offering. The offering is projected to generate around $20.0 million in gross proceeds for the Company, before additional costs.

news.headline: France considers taxing Bitcoin HODLers on 'unproductive wealth', alarming a Web3 marketer due to crypto market volatility.
news.summary: An individual in the marketing sector of Web3 expressed concerns to Decrypt about the potential implementation of a Bitcoin tax on unrealized gains. They described the proposal as "worrying" and stated that it seems "out of touch" considering the extreme volatility of the cryptocurrency markets.

news.headline: French Socialist Leader Olivier Faure: President Macron has accepted to see all those who were part of the "republican front".
French Socialist Head: I won't join a government with a right-wing PM.
French Socialist Leader: We told Macron we demand political change and a left-wing PM.
French Socialist Leader: President Macron did not impose any prerequisite on anything.
China has big room to raise fiscal deficit - Xinhua Commentary
Qi Biodesign raises $75M funding for genome editing technologies; Seed, Pre-A, and Series A rounds completed.
news.summary: On December 6, 2024, Qi Biodesign, a leading biotechnology firm specializing in advanced genome editing techniques, revealed the successful conclusion of its Series A funding round. With this latest funding, the company has amassed a grand total of $75 million from its Seed, Series Pre-A, and Series A financing rounds.

news.headline: SkyWater to receive $16M from CHIPS for America program to boost semiconductor production in Minnesota.
news.summary: SkyWater Technology, a technology realization partner based in Bloomington, Minnesota, has entered into a preliminary memorandum of terms (PMT) with the CHIPS for America program, overseen by the U.S. Department of Commerce. The PMT is valued at a significant sum, reaching up to $16 million. This potential funding aims to offer federal incentives to bolster production capacities at SkyWater’s facility in Minnesota. The CHIPS Act funding is set to expedite the modernization efforts at the facility.

news.headline: Newmont Corp to sell CC&V for $275M to SSR Mining. Gross proceeds to reach $3.9B from divestitures.
news.summary: Newmont Corporation (NYSE: NEM, TSX: NGT, ASX: NEM, PNGX: NEM) has announced the sale of its Cripple Creek & Victor (CC&V) operation in Colorado, USA to SSR Mining Inc. for a cash consideration of up to $275 million. This sale is part of Newmont's strategy to divest non-core assets and investment sales, with gross proceeds totaling up to $3.9 billion. The transaction is anticipated to close soon.

news.headline: CRH plc appoints Alan Connolly as Interim CFO effective January 1, 2025, as Jim Mintern transitions to CEO role.
news.summary: In New York, leading building materials solutions provider CRH plc (NYSE: CRH) has named Alan Connolly as the Interim Chief Financial Officer starting January 1, 2025. This move follows the September 24, 2024 announcement that the current Chief Financial Officer, Jim Mintern, will transition to the Chief Executive Officer role on the same date. The selection process was thorough and inclusive, involving an independent recruitment consultant and evaluating candidates from both within the company and externally.

news.headline: United Homes Group, Inc. priced secondary public offering of 7,420,057 Class A shares at $5.00 each. ($5.00, 7,420,057)
news.summary: United Homes Group, Inc. revealed the pricing details for its secondary underwritten public offering, known as the Offering. The Offering consists of 7,420,057 shares of the Company’s Class A common stock, named the Offered Shares, which are priced at $5.00 per share. Notably, 1,448,200 of the Offered Shares are being acquired by the Company’s Executive Chairman, Interim CEO, Kennedy Lewis Agency Partners, LLC affiliates, and certain other parties.

news.headline: Bitcoin's impact on the economy is growing with a market value of over $1 trillion, influencing financial transactions globally.
eMerge Americas announces 2025 Healthtech Innovation Hub presented by Jackson Health System and UHealth, welcoming new partners.
news.summary: In Miami on December 6, 2024, the prestigious global technology conference and expo, eMerge Americas, announced the launch of the Healthtech Innovation Hub for the upcoming year. This initiative is in partnership with Jackson Health System and UHealth – University of Miami Health System. This hub will serve as a platform for showcasing cutting-edge advancements in healthcare technology.

news.headline: ezPaycheck software updated for IRS 2024 forms, helping small businesses streamline year-end tax reporting.
news.summary: On December 6, 2024, a prominent software solutions provider for small businesses, Halfpricesoft.com, revealed a major upgrade to its widely used ezPaycheck payroll software. This update guarantees alignment with the current IRS 2024 Form.

news.headline: Beacon Therapeutics reports positive 3-month data from Phase 2 DAWN trial of laru-zova (AGTC-501) in XLRP patients, showing improvement in low luminance visual acuity. Well-tolerated by all participants. Promising results build confidence in laru-zova as a potential treatment.
news.summary: The Phase 2 DAWN study has shown that laru-zova is being well-tolerated by all participants. Early data indicates significant improvements in low luminance visual acuity (LLVA), which is an important indicator of visual function. These positive results are boosting confidence in laru-zova as a potential treatment for patients with X-linked retinitis pigmentosa (XLRP), with promising implications for the future of this therapy.

news.headline: The9's joint venture partner raised annual revenue to RMB900M and profit to RMB300M from RMB600M and RMB200M.
news.summary: In Shanghai on December 6, 2024, The9 Limited revealed that its wholly-owned subsidiary, Shanghai The9 Information Technology Co., Ltd., has signed an amendment agreement to a joint venture agreement. The9, a reputable Internet company listed on Nasdaq as NCTY, made this significant announcement.

news.headline: Front Signs completes 12 sky-high displays along the 14 Freeway for Lancaster Auto Mall, impacting the community.
news.summary: Front Signs has recently unveiled twelve new sky-high displays along the 14 Freeway for the Lancaster Auto Mall in Burbank, California. The project was finalized on December 6, 2024, showcasing eye-catching signs to the community. This initiative is set to have a significant impact by offering increased visibility for the auto mall in the area.

news.headline: Kirkland's reports Q3 2024 results: Net sales <specific number> for 13-week period ended Nov 2, 2024.
news.summary: Nashville, Tennessee - On December 6, 2024, Kirkland's, Inc. (Nasdaq: KIRK), a well-known specialty retailer focusing on home décor and furnishings, revealed its financial performance for the 13-week and 39-week periods concluding on November 2, 2024. In a snapshot of the Third Quarter 2024, the Company reported significant net sales growth...

news.headline: GRVT gains Bermuda license for hybrid crypto exchange. CEO believes regulation can enhance DEXs and promote universal standards.
news.summary: The CEO of GRVT highlighted that there is no need to separate CeFi and DeFi ecosystems, as regulations can play a crucial role in enhancing universal standards for Decentralized Exchanges (DEXs). This approach aims to unify the two sectors and foster collaboration. The CEO emphasized the importance of regulatory measures in elevating DEX operations to meet established global benchmarks. As a result, this strategy can lead to increased trust in the sector and create a more robust framework for the digital asset industry.

news.headline: Origin of significant global seafood supply remains uncertain. Tracking becomes a challenge due to lack of transparency.
Beam Therapeutics appoints Sravan Emany as Chief Financial Officer, effective Dec. 19, 2024. Emany previously served at Ironwood Pharmaceuticals as CFO and COO.
news.summary: In Cambridge, Massachusetts, on December 6, 2024, Beam Therapeutics Inc. (Nasdaq: BEAM), a biotechnology firm specializing in precision genetic medicines utilizing base editing, disclosed the selection of Sravan K. Emany as the chief financial officer (CFO), starting December 19, 2024. Mr. Emany arrives at Beam with extensive worldwide operational, commercial, and financial expertise derived from roles in multinational public companies and financial entities. His prior position was as the CFO and chief operating officer at Ironwood Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
